build.beforeDevCommand: npm run tauri:sync --prefix ../web && npm run dev --prefix ../web
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build --prefix ../web && uv run ../scripts/build-sidecar.py windows-x86_64

security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:*

bundle.longDescription: Local-first catalog and organizer for Ableton Live projects. Reads .als files, dedupes, tags, and surfaces forgotten gems.
